title: Fix tsconfig.json module and clean up unused tsconfig files
description: tsconfig.json:4 has module: CommonJS inconsistent with package.json:31 type:module. Change to ESNext. Also delete the unreferenced tsconfig.docker.json, tsconfig.stdio.json, tsconfig.test.json. Update Dockerfile if it references any of them (Dockerfile:35 copies tsconfig*.json — that's the glob, OK).
validation: Read tsconfig.json, confirm module: ESNext. Delete the 3 unused tsconfig.*.json files. Run `bun x tsc --noEmit` to confirm no breakage.
